query:
-- Insert missing primary author rows (co-authors that were skipped during the split)
INSERT IGNORE INTO author_profiles (authorName)
VALUES 
  ('Ashvin Vaidyanathan'),
  ('Colin Bryar'),
  ('Frances Frei'),
  ('Jack Stack');
command:

  ('Colin Bryar'),
  ('Frances Frei'),
